other_observers: None; I am the original observer. Other did see and reepoted
specific_location: North Lake Park located at the intersection of 29th st and Taft Ave in Loveland, Colorado
description: Complete black head and neck, could not see white neck bank, white wing bars, high contrast flanks and undertail when compared with front of bird, smaller in size than other geese in area (see pictures)Behaviors: Observed bird very close by, many other white cheeked geese in area, bird was grazing on the grass within the parkCall: none notedPlumage: Immature. No white neck band
photographer: Photographer: jIM tHOMPSON, Jim Thompson, Jim Thompson, Jim Thompson, Jim Thompson
